title: Fix beads git sync
description: Configure the dotfiles repo so Beads local database files stay private while portable Beads export/config files are synced through git.
close_reason: Configured Beads initialization, git-tracked metadata/export files, hooks, auto-export, and Dolt push.

title: Remove agent-shell from thbemacs
description: Remove agent-shell references or configuration from thbemacs if present. Verify the Emacs config still loads cleanly after removal.

title: Clarify beads startup guidance
description: Replace AGENTS guidance that says to run bd onboard with bd prime, since onboard is setup-oriented and redundant in an initialized repo.
close_reason: Updated AGENTS guidance to prefer bd prime and reserve bd onboard for setup.

title: Close-read emacs-solo for thbemacs modernization
description: Close-read https://github.com/LionyxML/emacs-solo and compare its Emacs configuration patterns against thbemacs. Suggest actionable changes focused on startup/runtime performance, lazy loading, package selection, built-in replacements, package manager modernization, and reducing/modernizing dependencies. Capture recommendations with rationale, expected impact, and migration risks.
close_reason: Completed emacs-solo comparison report and filed follow-up implementation tasks.

comments.author: tahir
comments.text: Completed close-read and captured recommendations in docs/plans/2026-07-05-thbemacs-emacs-solo-modernization.md. Created follow-up implementation issues: dotfiles-p18, dotfiles-3jf, dotfiles-wll.
